name: Private Internet Access (PIA)
description: Commercial VPN service provider known for strong privacy protections. Note: PIA is primarily a VPN service, not a traditional proxy provider. Acquired by Kape Technologies in 2019.
headquarters: United States (original), now owned by Kape Technologies
key_differentiator: Strict no-logs policy, open-source software, RAM-only servers, 10+ years industry experience
ownership_note: Kape Technologies also owns CyberGhost, ExpressVPN, ZenMate, and Intego
